AMENDED NOTICE OF SEIZURE AND NOTICE OF INITIATION OF JUDICIAL FORFEITURE PROCEEDINGS (H&S 11488.4(A); 11488.5(A)(1)) FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION $180,672.25 ; ALL ASSETS IN CHASE BANK ACCOUNT NO. 3113868753 THOSE ASSETS BEING $10,884.72 U.S. CURRENCY; ALL ASSETS IN CHASE BANK ACCOUNT NO. 4326139824 THOSE ASSETS BEING $94.33 U.S. CURRENCY
ORDER RELEASING PROPERTY PURSUANT TO PENAL CODE SECTION 1536 AND ORDER TO DEPOSIT MONEY AS TO BANK ACCOUNTS ONLY

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $95,825.65 U.S. CURRENCY BE RELEASED TO ATTORNEY CAROLYN HAGIN ON BEHALF OF CLAIMANTS KAROLINA MARCINKOWSKA AND ODHRAN MCLAUGHLIN. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $95,825.65 U.S. CURRENCY, PLUS INTEREST SINCE DATE OF DEPOSIT IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PURSUANT TO H&S 11470 ET SEQ AND DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY H&S 11489. ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING THE SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF THIS FORFEITURE IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. ANY STIPULATIONS WHICH STAYED THIS FORFEITURE PROCEEDING IS RELEASED. CLAIMANT WAIVES HIS/HER RIGHT TO HAVE SAME JUDGE OR JURY DECIDE BOTH THE CRIMINAL AND FORFEITURE CASE. CLAIMANT WAIVES CONDITION PRECEDENT TO THIS FORFEITURE. THE FOLLOWING PROPERTY: $180,672.25 U.S. CURRENCY; ALL ASSETS IN CHASE BANK ACCOUNT NO. 3113868753 THOSE ASSETS BEING $10,884.72 U.S. CURRENCY; ALL ASSETS IN CHASE BANK ACCOUNT NO. 4326139824 THOSE ASSETS BEING $94.33 U.S. CURRENCY HELD UNDER SFPD NUMBER 140-332-620 AND SEIZED UNDER SEARCH WARRANT IN THIS CASE, BE RELEASED TO THE SFPD FOR THE PURPOSES OF DISTRIBUTING PROPERTY PURSUANT TO H&S CODE SECTION 11489. PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

PETITION FOR FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUJECT TO DISPOSITION $180,672.25 US CURRENCY DOES 1 TO 100, INCLUSIVE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
